---
id: register-via-invite
title: "Create an account from an invite"
description: "Creates a local-password account and joins the invite's group in one"
sidebar_label: "Create an account from an invite"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create an account from an invite"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/invites/{token}/register"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a local-password account and joins the invite's group in one
step. The invite is single-use. When the invite is email-restricted,
`email` may be omitted (the invite's address is used).


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>
  
</ParamsDetails>
